# Energy First Solar

> Energy First Solar is a residential solar company serving homeowners with solar panel design, solar savings consultations, battery backup options, and monitoring support.

## Services

- Residential solar panel systems
- Solar savings consultations
- Battery backup planning
- Roof and energy assessments
- Permit and utility guidance
- Solar monitoring support

## Service area

Primary placeholder service areas include Your City, Northside, Westfield, Lakeview, Oak Ridge and Your County.

- Website: https://energyfirstsolar.com/
- Phone: (555) 015-2244
- Location: Your City, ST 00000

## Publishing note

Phone number, ratings, testimonials, incentives, financing, warranties, utility rules, service area and business claims are placeholders. Replace them with verified company information before publishing.
